dialogue: *the north side of the base burns behind a line of emergency lights*
I could not stop them all.
You stopped the one that mattered. The base did not survive, but the people did.
My diagonal theory did not help.
Then we stop theorising in the open and move to the secondary base.
The Director built it for the day our walls failed. Today is that day.
*the convoy pulls out as Leonard balances a laptop on his knees*
If they fire again, I can still read the grid.
Good. One wall in the right place can reroute an entire frontier.
*a missile alert screams from the laptop speakers*
Target is not the base. It is the convoy. End distance: {endDistance}.
Everyone stay moving. {userName}, keep the route open and make it too long.
